handoff.title: Book a call · {name}
handoff.contextBody: 4 turns · 2 artifacts (Perpres §C(7), SPV diagram). Aisha is exploring a minority convertible into a MIND ID JV.
handoff.pickSlot: Pick a slot · 30 minutes · Jakarta time
handoff.noteBody: Want to walk through the convertible mechanics + timing for the IC pre-read.
handoff.confirmsEmail: Confirms via email + adds to your calendar

compare.title: 3 opportunities, head-to-head
compare.subtitle: Pulled from your active projects · Updated 14:08 WIB
compare.synthesisBody: Sulawesi Ni leads on IRR but carries the highest execution risk and longest path to FID. Batam DC offers the fastest deployment and structurally similar incentives at half the ticket. If you're optimizing for J-curve, Batam first → Sulawesi second. Want me to draft an IC pre-read on this sequencing?

notifications.subhead: 3 updates need your eyes · 1 analyst reply pending · 1 new match for your thesis

onboarding.guestOrProjectPre: Continue exploring as a guest, or start a
onboarding.fromMapBody: A project gives you persistent threads, a shared canvas with your team, and direct access to {bkpm} analysts covering this sector.
onboarding.analystsCover: 3 analysts cover Sulawesi critical minerals · usually reply < 2h
onboarding.thesisBody: We'll route your threads to the right {bkpm} analysts and surface matched opportunities. You can refine this anytime.

emptyState.body: Name this project, then start a thread. The shared canvas will collect every regulation, comp, and structure as we go — and a {bkpm} analyst is one ↗ away.

desktopOnly.title: Open on desktop
desktopOnly.body: Wilaya is currently optimized for desktop screens. The phone & tablet experience is still in development — please open it on a computer or laptop with a screen at least 1024px wide.
desktopOnly.hint: Your screen is currently too narrow to show the map and analysis panels.
desktopOnly.footer: Investment Explorer · BKPM Republic of Indonesia
